Legendary UK Balearic house DJ since the 1980s, a trailblazer in global club culture with decades of musical influence.
Serves as GraffPUNKS godfather DJ ambassador, curating powerful tracks for the 24/7 blockchain radio station in the Crypto Moonboys universe.
His iconic beats fuel metaverse events like Hard Fork Games, merging street-art rebellion with digital soundscapes for warriors in Block Topia.
Bridges the gap between physical music heritage and Web3 innovation, inspiring factions like The GRAFFPUNKS to fight with rhythm and resistance.

Trevor Fung, a pioneering UK Balearic house DJ since the 1980s, has shaped global club culture with his innovative sound, now bringing that legacy into the Crypto Moonboys universe as GraffPUNKS’ godfather DJ ambassador. His beats, born from decades of musical revolution, resonate through Block Topia as a unifying force for warriors of the metaverse.

Serving on the GraffPUNKS 24/7 blockchain radio station, Trevor curates music that energizes Crypto Moonboys events like the Hard Fork Games, blending street-art rebellion with digital soundscapes. His tracks are more than background noise—they’re the heartbeat of the rebellion, driving fighters to push beyond their limits in the face of digital oppression.

Trevor’s influence in Block Topia extends beyond music, as his cultural impact inspires new forms of expression among the rebellion’s artists and coders. Graffiti glyphs synced to his rhythms often appear in battle zones, a testament to how his sound fuels not just physical fights, but the ideological war for freedom in the decentralized landscape.
